beginnerGuide.title: LOVE Hotel Simulator Beginner Guide
beginnerGuide.intro: This beginner guide introduces the main gameplay loop of LOVE Hotel Simulator. Learn how to manage hotel operations, improve rooms, satisfy guests, and expand your business step by step.

steps.title: Start Your Hotel Operations
steps.description: Learn the basic controls and understand the main hotel management interface. Begin by managing available spaces and preparing your first rooms for guests.

steps.title: Prepare and Customize Rooms
steps.description: Create attractive guest rooms by placing furniture, improving decorations, and adjusting layouts to provide better customer experiences.

steps.title: Manage Guests and Services
steps.description: Monitor guest needs, maintain satisfaction levels, and improve daily operations to increase hotel performance.

steps.title: Expand Your Hotel
steps.description: Use earned resources to unlock improvements, upgrade facilities, and grow from a small hotel into a larger business.

steps.title: Optimize Early Progression
steps.description: Focus on efficient upgrades, balanced spending, and smart management decisions to build a stronger foundation.

quickTips: Keep a cash buffer before spending on new decorations or staff.
Watch guest satisfaction first, steady income follows happy customers.
Upgrade one room fully before expanding into new ones.
Revisit your layout often to improve service flow and guest comfort.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about LOVE Hotel Simulator

questions.question: What is LOVE Hotel Simulator?
questions.answer: LOVE Hotel Simulator is a first-person hotel management and life simulation game where you build, customize, and run your own love hotel on Steam.

questions.question: Where can I play LOVE Hotel Simulator?
questions.answer: LOVE Hotel Simulator is available on PC through Steam. You can wishlist or purchase it from the official Steam store page.

questions.question: What do you do in LOVE Hotel Simulator?
questions.answer: In LOVE Hotel Simulator you design rooms, hire and manage staff, handle guest requests, upgrade facilities, and grow your hotel business step by step.

questions.question: Does LOVE Hotel Simulator have multiplayer or co-op?
questions.answer: LOVE Hotel Simulator is a single-player simulation experience. Check the Steam store page for the latest official feature details.

questions.question: How often does LOVE Hotel Simulator get updates?
questions.answer: The development team shares announcements and content updates for LOVE Hotel Simulator through the Steam store page and Steam Community hub.

questions.question: Is LOVE Hotel Simulator suitable for my PC?
questions.answer: Review the system requirements on the LOVE Hotel Simulator Steam store page to confirm your hardware meets the minimum and recommended specs.
